instructions: V60 recipe for wet-hulled Indonesian coffees. Wet-hulled beans have lower density and higher solubility due to the unique Giling Basah process, so a coarser grind and moderate 91C water prevent over-extraction of harsh herbal compounds. The 30-second bloom with a gentle swirl ensures even wetting of the uneven bean surface typical of wet-hulled processing. Two structured center pours maintain a flat bed. Produces a rich, full-bodied cup with deep chocolate, warm spice, and a clean finish free of excess earthiness.
